description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a small lawn area with several palm trees, and a fenced perimeter. The building has large windows, especially on the side, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, and the landscaping is minimalistic with a focus on open green space. The entrance is set back from the driveway, and there is a small patio or seating area visible in the front yard. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a landscaped front yard with palm trees and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entrance, lawn with palm trees, and fenced boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long window, side fencing, and the continuation of the green lawn and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a mostly solid wall, showing the back of the bungalow and part of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, cars, and the arrangement of palm trees in the yard.
